name: Sino-Ocean Service Holding Limited
summary: Sino-Ocean Service Holding Limited, an investment holding company, primarily offers property management services in the People's Republic of China. The company's property management services comprising security, cleaning, greening, gardening, and repair and maintenance services to property owners and residents, as well as property developers. Its property management portfolio covers residential and nonresidential properties, such as commercial properties comprising office buildings, shopping malls, and hotels; and public and other properties consisting of hospitals, public service facilities, government buildings, and schools. The company's value-added services, such as pre-delivery services to property developers to assist with their sales and marketing activities at property sales venues and display units; consultancy services to assist with the overall planning and management of pre-sale activities; and property engineering services. Its community value-added services include carpark management, utility management, and community space operation services; community living services, such as home decoration, purchase assistance, turnkey furnishing and move-in, housekeeping, and other bespoken services; and property brokerage services to property owners and residents of its managed properties. Sino-Ocean Service Holding Limited also offers information technology services. The company was founded in 1997 and is headquartered in Beijing, China. Sino-Ocean Service Holding Limited is a subsidiary of Shine Wind Development Limited.
